billing-footnote: Billed monthly · cancel anytime · secure checkout by Stripe
design-cta: Quiet by default. Yours by choice.
design-cta-body: Choose a paper or ink palette, adjust type and density, and reduce motion whenever you want.
design-statement: Simple does not mean empty. It means every remaining detail carries more weight.
feedback-board-description: See what others are saying, or share your own thoughts.
hero-subheading: Four tiers, one studio. Unlock the full toolset, the RMH API, and a verified badge — or scale the whole thing to your company.
no-feedback-yet: No feedback yet. Be the first!
quotes-footer-note: “Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work. And the only way to do great work is to love what you do.”
quotes-hero-description: A curated collection of the most memorable words from Steve Jobs — co-founder of Apple, visionary, and one of the most influential thinkers of the modern era.
sign-in-to-manage-developer-keys: Sign in to manage developer keys
sign-in-to-see-wrapped: Sign in to see your Wrapped
sign-in-to-track-progress: Sign in to track your progress
spatial-design-lede: A quieter foundation for an ambitious platform. Paper, ink, proportion, and motion—nothing without a reason.
spatial-principle-focus-body: Every screen begins with what people came to do. Navigation recedes, hierarchy sharpens, and empty space becomes useful structure.
spatial-principle-motion-body: Motion clarifies relationships. Quiet parallax, route continuity, and precise state changes make the platform feel physical—not busy.
spatial-principle-system-body: Games, tools, community, and commerce share the same proportions, typography, controls, and interaction logic.
status-cancelled: Checkout cancelled. No charge was made.
status-success: Welcome aboard — your membership is being activated.
